chunks.text:
# Business Glossary - E-Commerce Domain (Simplified)

This document defines the core business concepts for the e-commerce platform test dataset.

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
CUSTOMER
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Definition**: An individual or entity registered on the platform who has made at least one purchase.

**Business Context**: Customers are the primary actors in the e-commerce system. They browse products, place orders, an... [TRUNCATED]

**Business Context**: Line items break down orders into individual product purchases. Each captures the price at the moment of ordering.

**Key Attributes**:
- Unique line identifier
- References exactly one Product
- Quantity of units ordered
- Unit price at time of order (historical, not current)
- Extended amount = quantity × unit price

**Business Rules**:
- A Sales Order must contain at least one line item
- Cannot be modified after order confirmation
- Unit price is fixed and does not chan... [TRUNCATED]

Sales Order Relationships:
- A Sales Order is placed by exactly one Customer
- A Sales Order has one or more Order Line Items
- A Sales Order has one or more Payments
- A Sales Order has one or more Shipments

Order Line Item Relationships:
- An Order Line Item is part of exactly one Sales Order
- An Order Line Item references exactly one Product

Payment Relationships:
- A Payment is for exactly one Sales Order

Shipment Relationships:
- A Shipment is for exactly one Sales Order
- A Shipment co... [TRUNCATED]

## MODIFIED FOR TEST A
Refund: A reimbursement issued to a customer when an order is cancelled.

## SECOND MODIFICATION — extra term
Return Policy: Products can be returned within 30 days of purchase for a full refund.

# Data Dictionary - E-Commerce Database (Simplified)

This document describes the physical database schema for the simplified e-commerce test dataset.

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
CUSTOMER_MASTER
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Description**: Master record for all registered platform customers.

**Primary Key**: CUST_ID (INT, auto-increment)

**Column Details**:
| Column | Type | Description | Nullable |
|--------|------|-----------... [TRUNCATED]

**Foreign Keys**:
- CUST_ID → CUSTOMER_MASTER(CUST_ID)

**Business Concept Mapping**: SalesOrder

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
ORDER_LINE_ITEM
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Description**: Individual product lines within a sales order.

**Primary Key**: LINE_ID (INT, auto-increment)

**Column Details**:
| Column | Type | Description | Nullable |
|--------|------|-------------|----------|
| LINE_ID | INT | Unique line identifier | NO... [TRUNCATED]

CUSTOMER_MASTER.CUST_ID
  └── SALES_ORDER_HDR.CUST_ID

TB_PRODUCT.PRODUCT_ID
  └── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.PRODUCT_ID

TB_CATEGORY.CATEGORY_ID
  ├── TB_PRODUCT.CATEGORY_ID
  └── TB_CATEGORY.PARENT_CATEGORY_ID (self-reference)

SALES_ORDER_HDR.ORDER_ID
  ├── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.ORDER_ID
  ├── PAYMENT.ORDER_ID
  └── SHIPMENT.ORDER_ID

BUSINESS CONCEPT TO TABLE MAPPING
═════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

Customer         → CUSTOMER_MASTER
Product          → TB_PRODUCT
SalesOrder     ... [TRUNCATED]

triplets.subject: CUSTOMER_MASTER
triplets.object: Master record for all registered platform customers.

triplets.subject: TB_PRODUCT
triplets.object: Master catalogue of all products available for sale.

triplets.subject: SALES_ORDER_HDR
triplets.object: Header record for each customer sales order.

triplets.subject: ORDER_LINE_ITEM
triplets.object: Individual product lines within a sales order.

entities_post_resolution.name: Tb Category.Parent Category Id
entities_post_resolution.definition: TB_CATEGORY.PARENT_CATEGORY_ID is a self-referencing column in the category table that stores the identifier of the parent category to model a hierarchical category structure.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
TB_CATEGORY.CATEGORY_ID
  ├── TB_PRODUCT.CATEGORY_ID
  └── TB_CATEGORY.PARENT_CATEGORY_ID (self-reference) | **Column Details**:
| Column | Type | Description | Nullable |
|--------|------|-------------|----------|
| CATEGORY_ID | INT | Category reference | NO | | **Primary Key**: CATEGORY_ID (INT, auto-increment) | **Column Details**:
| Column | Type | Description | Nullable |
|--------|------|-------------|----------|
| CATEGORY_NAME | VARCHAR(200) | Category display name | NO | | Category         → TB_CATEGORY | **Column Details**:
| Column | Type | Description | Nullable |
|--------|------|-------------|----------|
| PARENT_CATEGORY_ID | INT | Parent category for hierarchy | YES | | **Primary Key**: PRODUCT_ID (INT, auto-increment) | **Foreign Keys**:
- PRODUCT_ID → TB_PRODUCT(PRODUCT_ID) | **Column Details**:
| Column | Type | Description | Nullable |
|--------|------|-------------|----------|
| PRODUCT_NAME | VARCHAR(300) | Product display name | NO |

entities_post_resolution.name: Customer Master
entities_post_resolution.definition: Master record for all registered platform customers, serving as the canonical source of customer attributes and identity identified by CUST_ID.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
CUSTOMER_MASTER
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Description**: Master record for all registered platform customers. | **Foreign Keys**:
- CUST_ID → CUSTOMER_MASTER(CUST_ID) | CUSTOMER_MASTER.CUST_ID
  └── SALES_ORDER_HDR.CUST_ID | Customer         → CUSTOMER_MASTER

entities_post_resolution.name: Customer Address
entities_post_resolution.definition: Customer Address is the delivery location associated with a customer used as the destination for shipments in the e-commerce domain.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
Shipment Relationships:
- A Shipment goes to exactly one Customer Address | # Business Glossary - E-Commerce Domain (Simplified)

This document defines the core business concepts for the e-commerce platform test dataset.

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
CUSTOMER
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Definition**: An individual or entity registered on the platform who has made at least one purchase. | Sales Order Relationships:
- A Sales Order is placed by exactly one Customer | Customer         → CUSTOMER_MASTER | Refund: A reimbursement issued to a customer when an order is cancelled.

entities_post_resolution.name: At Least One
entities_post_resolution.definition: An item record on a sales order that specifies a product, its quantity, and is associated with a specific order.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Business Rules**:
- A Sales Order must contain at least one line item | **Key Attributes**:
- Unique line identifier
- References exactly one Product | **Key Attributes**:
- Quantity of units ordered | **Key Attributes**:
- Unit price at time of order (historical, not current) | **Key Attributes**:
- Extended amount = quantity × unit price | Order Line Item Relationships:
- An Order Line Item is part of exactly one Sales Order | Order Line Item Relationships:
- An Order Line Item references exactly one Product | **Column Details**:
| Column | Type | Description | Nullable |
|--------|------|-------------|----------|
| ORDER_DATE | DATE | Date order was placed | NO | | **Primary Key**: ORDER_ID (BIGINT, auto-increment) | **Foreign Keys**:
- ORDER_ID → SALES_ORDER_HDR(ORDER_ID) | ORDER_LINE_ITEM
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Description**: Individual product lines within a sales order. | **Primary Key**: LINE_ID (INT, auto-increment) | TB_PRODUCT.PRODUC

entities_post_resolution.name: Payment
entities_post_resolution.definition: A Payment is a monetary transaction record tied to exactly one Sales Order, identified by a unique Payment_ID, representing the payment made for that order.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
Payment Relationships:
- A Payment is for exactly one Sales Order | Payment          → PAYMENT | **Primary Key**: PAYMENT_ID (BIGINT, auto-increment) | SALES_ORDER_HDR.ORDER_ID
  ├── PAYMENT.ORDER_ID | Sales Order Relationships:
- A Sales Order has one or more Payments

entities_post_resolution.name: Product
entities_post_resolution.definition: A Product is a distinct item or SKU in the product catalog that can be referenced by orders and return policies.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Key Attributes**:
- Unique line identifier
- References exactly one Product | Order Line Item Relationships:
- An Order Line Item references exactly one Product | Product          → TB_PRODUCT | Return Policy: Products can be returned within 30 days of purchase for a full refund.

entities_post_resolution.name: Return Policy
entities_post_resolution.definition: Policy governing the return of products within a specified period (e.g., 30 days) with eligibility for a full refund.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: Return Policy: Products can be returned within 30 days of purchase for a full refund. | Refund: A reimbursement issued to a customer when an order is cancelled.

entities_post_resolution.name: Shipment
entities_post_resolution.definition: Shipment is the business entity representing a single movement of goods from a warehouse to fulfill a sales order, uniquely identified by SHIPMENT_ID.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
Shipment Relationships:
- A Shipment is for exactly one Sales Order | Shipment Relationships:
- A Shipment comes from exactly one Warehouse | Shipment Relationships:
- A Shipment goes to exactly one Customer Address | Shipment         → SHIPMENT | **Primary Key**: SHIPMENT_ID (BIGINT, auto-increment) | **Column Details**:
| WAREHOUSE_CODE | VARCHAR(20) | Source warehouse | YES | | **Column Details**:
| TRACKING_NUMBER | VARCHAR(100) | Carrier tracking number | YES | | **Column Details**:
| STATUS_CODE | VARCHAR(20) | PREPARING/SHIPPED/IN_TRANSIT/DELIVERED | NO | | SALES_ORDER_HDR.ORDER_ID
  └── SHIPMENT.ORDER_ID | Sales Order Relationships:
- A Sales Order has one or more Shipments

entities_post_resolution.name: Sales Order
entities_post_resolution.definition: A Sales Order is the business document that records a customer's order, serving as the header for one or more line items and representing the grouped order in the data model.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Business Rules**:
- A Sales Order must contain at least one line item | Order Line Item Relationships:
- An Order Line Item is part of exactly one Sales Order | Sales Order Relationships:
- A Sales Order is placed by exactly one Customer | Sales Order Relationships:
- A Sales Order has one or more Order Line Items | Sales Order Relationships:
- A Sales Order has one or more Payments | Sales Order Relationships:
- A Sales Order has one or more Shipments | Payment Relationships:
- A Payment is for exactly one Sales Order | Shipment Relationships:
- A Shipment is for exactly one Sales Order | SalesOrder       → SALES_ORDER_HDR

entities_post_resolution.name: Tb Category
entities_post_resolution.definition: TB_CATEGORY represents the hierarchical structure used to categorize and organize products within the catalog.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
TB_CATEGORY
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Description**: Hierarchical product category tree. | TB_CATEGORY.CATEGORY_ID
  ├── TB_PRODUCT.CATEGORY_ID | TB_CATEGORY.CATEGORY_ID
  ├── TB_PRODUCT.CATEGORY_ID
  └── TB_CATEGORY.PARENT_CATEGORY_ID (self-reference) | Category         → TB_CATEGORY | TB_PRODUCT
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Description**: Master catalogue of all products available for sale. | **Foreign Keys**:
- PRODUCT_ID → TB_PRODUCT(PRODUCT_ID) | TB_PRODUCT.PRODUCT_ID
  └── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.PRODUCT_ID | Product          → TB_PRODUCT

entities_post_resolution.name: Auto Incrementing Primary Key
entities_post_resolution.definition: An auto-incrementing numeric primary key column used to uniquely identify records in a table.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: **Primary Key**: ORDER_ID (BIGINT, auto-increment) | **Primary Key**: CUST_ID (INT, auto-increment) | **Primary Key**: PRODUCT_ID (INT, auto-increment) | **Primary Key**: CATEGORY_ID (INT, auto-increment) | **Primary Key**: LINE_ID (INT, auto-increment)

tables_enriched.name: Customer Master
tables_enriched.description: This table stores core customer records, including identifying information, contact details, regional affiliation, account creation timestamp, and active status.

tables_enriched.name: Product
tables_enriched.description: Stores product catalog information including identifiers, SKU, name, category reference, pricing, and active status for the product inventory.

tables_enriched.name: Category
tables_enriched.description: Stores taxonomy or classification categories for products, including hierarchical relationships between categories through parent category references.

tables_enriched.name: Sales Order Header
tables_enriched.description: Stores header information for sales orders, including customer reference, order timing, total amount, status, payment confirmation, delivery timestamp, and record creation time.

tables_enriched.name: Order Line Item
tables_enriched.description: Stores the individual line items for customer orders, including the product, quantity, unit price, and line total amount for each item in an order.

tables_enriched.name: Payment
tables_enriched.description: Stores records of payments processed for customer orders, including method, amount, status, and timestamps for creation and confirmation.

tables_enriched.name: Shipment
tables_enriched.description: Stores records of shipments linked to orders, including where and when shipped, tracking details, and current shipment status.
